name: io.github.modelcontextprotocol/server-slack
description: MCP server for Slack — send messages, manage channels, and interact with workspaces

tools.name: send_message
tools.description: Send a message to a Slack channel

tools.name: list_channels
tools.description: List available channels in the workspace

tools.name: get_channel_history
tools.description: Retrieve recent messages from a channel
